assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 31-37 contain '## Code Intelligence' with 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' and 'No limitations known — no Serena instances configured.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 5-6: 'No Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools. The tool listing was scanned for any tool names matching the `mcp__serena__*` pattern and none were found.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 12-13: 'User was prompted about continuing without code intelligence since no Serena instances are available. User chose to continue without code intelligence.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 39-43 contain '## Bug Configuration' with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'.

No Security Configuration section was added.' claude-md-result.md does not contain '## Security Configuration' — the file ends after Bug Configuration at line 43.
